title: Christmas Cosmetic
description: Add christmas themed visuals to my villagers pack
body:
This pack add christmas themed cosmetics to my villagers packs, namely [**[**<font color="#008000">**Hermitcraft Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hermitcraft-villagers), [**[**<font color="#008000">**Songs Of War Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/songs-of-war-villagers) and [**[**<font color="#008000">**Alex and Steve Villagers**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alex-and-steve-villagers)  

This pack uses some [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) exclusive features and therefore <font color="#f02222">**is not compatible with optifine!**</font>  
Keep track of what versions of my packs are compatible with wich addon version with this file: [[<font color="#daa520">with this link</font>](https://1drv.ms/x/c/5017ea34619ff0f9/EYARtfWSbd1IsoYWCn7M-CkBHKTpT6MVfBMwl93LenDkAg?e=dbVTA0)]  
<font color="#f02222">Require:</font> [**[**<font color="#008000">**Cosmetic Addon Lib**</font>**]**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-cosmetic-addon-lib)   


Villagers will randomly display:
- Christmas Hat
- Colorful scarf
- Small present
- Some villagers will not display anything.

Elements will have random combinaisons of colors and some diverse rotations. 
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76335e2237ba49cf625f467a46ae188b99fd5da9.png)
